radicchio-salad-with-caramelized-carrots.name: Radicchio Salad With Caramelized Carrots And Onions

ingredients.prep: leaves separated and cut into medium pieces

instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C. Toast almonds on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing halfway through, until golden brown, 8–10 minutes; set aside.

Cook carrots, 2 Tbsp. oil, 1 Tbsp. thyme, 1 tsp. salt, 1/4 tsp. red pepper, and 1 cup water in a large skillet over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, until water is evaporated, about 15 minutes. Continue to cook, stirring occasionally, until carrots are lightly browned and tender, about 5 minutes more.

Meanwhile, heat 2 Tbsp. oil in another large skillet over medium-high. Add onions, 1 tsp. salt, and remaining 1 Tbsp. thyme and 1/4 tsp. red pepper and cook, stirring occasionally, until onions are lightly browned and tender, 10–12 minutes.

Whisk garlic, vinegar, orange juice, honey, and remaining 1/4 cup oil and 3/4 tsp. salt in a large bowl. Add carrot mixture, onion mixture, radicchio, orange slices, and parsley and toss to coat. Top with reserved almonds.

radish-salad-with-kale-teleculinaria.name: Radish Salad With Kale
instructions: Light a pot with plenty of water, 1 bay leaf, a few drops of olive oil, salt and pepper. When you start boiling, add the washed radishes and let it cook for 5 minutes. In the same water, cook the cabbage. Remove and drain in a strainer. Cover these food sticks so they don't get cold.

Peel off the onions and garlic, cut the onions into buds and pinch the garlic. Light another pot with the rest of the olive oil, add the onion, garlic and other blond leaf and let it shine. Season with a drop of balsamic vinegar, sugar, salt and pepper and stir. Let me check for a few minutes and remove it from the fire.
Coloque a couve numa tigela ou travessa e, por cima, disponha os rabanetes cortados em gomos. Junte a cebolada, regue com o molho de azeite, eliminando o louro, e sirva quente.

rain-cookies-teleculinaria.name: Rain Cookies
instructions: Throw the yeast and flour into a bowl and mix. Then open a cavity to the center and add the eggs and milk, in yarn and always stirring until it is well mixed. Let it rest for 5 minutes.
Take a deep fryer to the oiled fire, let it warm up, gather spoonfuls from the previous mixture and let them fry until golden.
Remove the fried dumplings, let them drip on an absorbent sheet of paper, then pass them through yellow sugar and serve them.

ranch-salad-comedera.name: Ranch Salad
instructions: With the help of a plastic knife or his hands we will get his lettuce broken or cut (depending on how much lettuce you choose) into small pieces.
En un bol ponemos a remojar la lechuga con una cucharada de vinagre por 10 minutos, pasado el tiempo la ponemos a escurrir sobre un colador. Reservamos.
We're gonna cut the onion into juicy and rinse it with water, shattering it a little to get her to let go.
Los tomates cherrys los vamos a cortar a mitad, y luego repetiremos ese corte con cada parte obtenida, hasta que queden finos pero que sea posible pincharlos con un tenedor.
En el bol que remojamos la lechuga vamos a colocar todos los ingredientes tratando de distribuirlos bien, que quede muy bien mezclados.
El aderezo y el queso lo espolvoreamos una vez que hayamos servido la ensalada en cada plato.
Enjoy this fresh and delicious salad!

raspberry-hazelnut-galette.name: Raspberry-hazelnut Galette

ingredients.item: All-purpose flour plus more for work surface

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Process hazelnuts, salt, and 1¼ cups flour in a food processor until nuts are very finely ground; transfer to a medium bowl and set aside.

Process butter and sugar in a food processor until smooth. Add egg yolks and pulse just to combine. Add reserved hazelnut mixture and pulse just until blended. Gather into a ball, flatten into a disk, and wrap in plastic. Chill for at least 2 hours.
DO AHEAD: Dough can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled. Let stand at room temperature for 15 minutes before rolling out.
Mix jam, lime zest, and lime juice in a small bowl to blend; set aside.

Roll out dough on a sheet of floured parchment paper to a 14” round about ⅛” thick, dusting dough with flour as needed to prevent sticking. Spread jam mixture over dough, leaving a 1½” border. Brush beaten egg on border of dough. Using parchment paper as an aid, fold border of dough over jam, pinching together any cracks in dough. Slide parchment paper with galette onto a baking sheet. Brush top of dough with beaten egg; sprinkle with raw sugar.

Bake galette, rotating halfway through, until crust is deep golden brown, 30–40 minutes. Run a large offset spatula or knife between tart and paper to release tart from any jam that may have bubbled out. Let cool completely on pan on a wire rack.
DO AHEAD: Galette can be made 3 days ahead. Keep loosely covered at room temperature.
Cut into wedges and serve with ice cream, if desired.

raspberry-rose-jam.name: Raspberry-rose Jam

ingredients.item: Two 1-pint canning jars or four 8-oz. canning jars with lids

instructions: Toss raspberries and sugar in a large heavy pot. Let sit until raspberries start to release their juices, 20–30 minutes.

Cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally at first and then more often as mixture thickens (as sugars concentrate, jam will be more likely to scorch), until most of the liquid evaporates and mixture is thickened, 30–40 minutes. To test for thickness, place a small dollop of jam on a chilled plate and chill 2 minutes. Drag your finger through: It should leave a clear path that doesn’t fill in. Remove from heat and stir in lemon juice and rose water. Divide between jars, cover, and chill.
Do Ahead: Jam can be made 2 months ahead. Keep chilled.

recipe-for-mini-banana-cake-with-dulce-d.name: Recipe For Mini Banana Cake With Dulce De Leche
recipe-for-mini-banana-cake-with-dulce-d.original_name: Receta de mini cake de banana con dulce de leche
instructions: Pela dos bananas.
Put them in a bowl and with the help of a fork, tighten them up till it's as purée.
It incorporates into the purée a tablespoon of honey and butter. Mix to integrate.
Coloca en un bol las tres claras de huevo.
Luego, incorpora las dos tazas de harina de avena.
Ahora, agrega una cucharada de esencia de vainilla y el polvo de hornear. Mezcla muy bien.
Produce and add the purée to the bowl with a handful of broken nuts. Mix to integrate.
It purifies the oven at 180 and 3.
Engrasa un molde para muffins.
Agrega la mezcla hasta la mitad, luego pon una cucharadita de dulce de leche repostero y vuelve a cubrir con la mezcla.
Baked for about 15 minutes or till they get up and get doradito.
Decorate with glass sugar or nuts.
Enjoy!

recipe-for-onions-stuffed-with-seafood-c.name: Recipe For Onions Stuffed With Seafood
recipe-for-onions-stuffed-with-seafood-c.original_name: Receta de cebollas rellenas de mariscos
instructions: Limpia muy bien las gambas y los calamares y retira cualquier impureza.
Corta los calamares en aros o trocitos.
Pela los dientes de ajo y trocea. Haz lo propio con el pimiento rojo.
Pela las cebollas y corta la parte superior. Retira un poco del centro y trocea.
Warm up a frying pan and melt the butter. Fry the onion and garlic teeth till golden, add the pepper and cold for a few minutes.
Incorpora las gambas y los calamares. Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto, mezcla y saltea por unos 4-5 minutos.
Incorpora la pasta de tomate y el vino blanco, mezcla y cocina hasta que reduzca.
Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
When the seafood sodrit is resting, fill with onions. Space with some mozzarella cheese and place onto an oven plate.
Hornea for 15 minutes or till smooth. Once ready, remove and enjoy them.

recipe-for-sardine-toast-with-peppers-co.name: Recipe For Sardine Toast With Peppers
recipe-for-sardine-toast-with-peppers-co.original_name: Receta de tosta de sardinas con pimientos

ingredients.item: 2  latas  de sardinas en aceite o agua

instructions: Abre las latas de las sardinas, escurre el agua o el aceite.
Con la ayuda de un tenedor retira las espinas de las sardinas. Reserva.
Corta el tallo de los pimientos y retira la semilla. Filetea en julianas.
Warm up a frying pan with olive oil, add the peppers, get some salt and scattering for about 4 minutes or till they get tender. Turn it off.
He scattering his toast with some olive oil, lays a cape of his peppers and then his sardines.
Add a few drops of lemon to every toast and decorate with parsley.
Enjoy!

red-bean-casserole-lezzet.name: Red Bean Casserole
instructions: 1. Soak the Barbunya from the evening.
2. Boil the next day water and boil a stone and strain.
3.   Peel the shells of the mates and chop the cube.
4. Clean and chop curls.
5. Onions shore.
6. Girl in liquid moth and pinken onions.
7. Add meat, roast the water until you shake it.
8. Add the salcayi to the meat with holes in 2 spoons of water.
9. Mix until light is dark.
10. 5 cups of water, boiled barbunya, salt, pepper, kimyon and spikes, and bake the barbunya and meat wrapped in the middle fire.
11. Serve hot for 10 minutes.
12.  Afiyet olsun.
12. August Try the recipe of barbunya batteryaki, which adds flavor to the dishes with low-calorie and light weight.

red-bean-salad-with-artichoke-lezzet.name: Red Bean Salad With Artichoke
instructions: 1. The salad recipes with plenty of ingredients have a special place.
2. The artichokes are divided into four parts.
3. Clean the cores of the yellow pepper and chop it in the form of cube.
4. Wash beans and take it in a bowl.
5. Add artichokes, onion, pepper, parsley and pepper.
6. Mix olive oil, lemon juice, salt and grated yellowms in a small bowl and blend on the salad.
7. Cover over 1 hour in the refrigerator.
8. If you like it, sprinkle the pepper again.

red-chile-paste.name: Red Chile Paste
instructions: Make a slit in each of the ancho chiles and New Mexico chiles with a sharp knife, and remove the seeds and stem.
Place the chiles in a large saucepan, and add the chicken stock, onion, and garlic.
Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat, then reduce heat to medium, and simmer until the chiles have softened, about 15 minutes.
Pour the chile mixture into a blender, filling the pitcher no more than halfway full.
Hold down the lid of the blender with a folded kitchen towel, and carefully start the blender, using a few quick pulses to get the mixture moving before leaving it on to puree.
Puree in batches until smooth and pour into a clean pot.
Alternately, you can use a stick blender and puree the chile mixture right in the cooking pot.

red-leaf-lettuce-salad-with-golden-beets.name: Red Leaf Lettuce Salad With Golden Beets And Grapes

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Combine lemon juice, garlic, Dijon mustard, anchovy paste, salt, and pepper for dressing in a bowl. Stream in olive oil, whisking until well combined; set aside.
Trim off the beets' leafy tops and root ends. Rub each beet with a little olive oil, and season with salt and pepper. Wrap each tightly in a piece of foil and place on a baking sheet.
Bake beets in the preheated oven until you can easily pierce through the centers with a paring knife, 40 to 45 minutes.

Remove beets from oven, and allow to cool still wrapped in foil until you can handle them, 10 to 15 minutes. Rub each beet with a paper towel to remove the skin. Set aside to cool, then cut to your preference, either into chunks or slices.

Tear lettuce leaves into pieces and add to a large bowl along with grapes and red onion. Add beets and give the salad a light stir. Drizzle some of the dressing to your taste, and toss gently until all is well coated. Store any remaining dressing tightly covered in the refrigerator.

red-mojo-picon-recipe-comedera.name: Red Mojo Picón Recipes

ingredients.item: 1 piece of Red Peppers or Pimenton (optional)

instructions: The first thing we'll do will be peeling the garlic. We'll have no need to get them stung, because we'll put them right into the mortar to shredder them.
Then we'll cut the piece of peppermint into small pieces. At base, the pimenton has to be clear and without seeds.
We will soon bring to the mortar the pimenton with the gills or cayenne (clear) peppers and garlic. We'll start milling till these vegetables get some kind of dough.
Entonces agregaremos una pizca de sal, la cucharada de comino y el pimiento dulce, y seguiremos triturando para que todo se vaya mezclando.

To integrate the ingredients well, we will add an oil thread. We'll continue to do this at the mortar while we're still pounding. With the oil, the salsa will be using a more liquid consistency, but we also have to abuse the quantity of this ingredient: we will use a maximum of 150 million (and that if you are the number 1 fan of the oil).

To complete a liquid consistency, we will add a vinegar chorrit (up to 20 million). We will mix everything well into the mortar and we will make sure to smash any remaining pieces that have some volume, whether of vegetables or of cumin.
Once we have a homogenous consistency, we will have our mojo tested to check the date. If necessary, we'll fix with a little more salt.

red-pepper-jam-pequerecetas.name: Red Pepper Jam
instructions: We wash and dry the peppers, we remove the trunk, the nerves (they are the white strips that have inside them) and the pits. We cut our peppers into small pieces and weigh them.

We put the pieces of the peppers into a bowl with the sugar and vinegar and water, we mix well and cook with medium heat. We let them cook about about 40 minutes, stirring from time to time. Once time goes by we shredded the mixture with care to avoid burning. We re-put the jam into the pits and let them cook 10 more minutes to weigh and remove from time to time.
Finally we passed the jam into sterilized glass pits and let them cool once cold we can use it.

red-velvet-valentines-day-cookies.name: Red Velvet Valentine's Day Cookies
instructions: Combine brown sugar, butter, and white sugar in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer until smooth and creamy. Mix in sour cream, food coloring, and egg.

Combine 2 1/2 cups flour, dark cocoa powder, regular cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl. Gradually stir flour mixture into butter mixture until well combined. Place dough in the refrigerator to chill for at least 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with a piece of greased and floured parchment paper.

Spread remaining 1/2 cup flour on a clean, dry surface and use some to coat a rolling pin. Roll chilled dough to a thickness of approximately 1/4 inch and cut cookies with whatever shape cookie cutter you like. Place 2 inches apart onto the prepared baking sheet.

Bake in batches in the preheated oven until cookies bounce back immediately after being touched, about 7 minutes. Cool on the baking sheet for 1 minute before removing to a wire rack to cool completely, 8 to 10 minutes more.
Stir 4 cups powdered sugar, Neufchatel cheese, butter, and vanilla extract in a large bowl until creamy. Fold in chocolate chips. Transfer frosting into a resealable plastic bag.
Cut one corner off the plastic bag and pipe frosting onto 1/2 of the cookies. Top with remaining cookies and sprinkle with remaining 1/4 cup powdered sugar.

restaurant-style-shoyu-miso-ramen.name: Restaurant-style Shoyu Miso Ramen

ingredients.item: Naruto (fish paste stick with a red spiral pattern). sliced

instructions: Preheat the oven to 135°C (135 degrees C).
Place black fungus in a large bowl; fill with water.
Combine mirin, 1/2 cup soy sauce, onion, 1/2 cup brown sugar, 3 chopped green onion bulbs, and garlic in an oven-safe pot over high heat; bring to a boil.
Place pork belly skin-side down on a flat work surface. Roll up lengthwise; secure with twine. Place pork belly into mirin mixture; partially cover pot with lid.
Bake in the preheated oven until pork is tender and an instant-read thermometer inserted into center reads at least 63°C (63 degrees C), about 4 hours.

Fill a bowl with ice and cold water; set aside. Meanwhile, bring a separate pot of water to a boil over high heat; gently add eggs and cook until yolks are barely set, 8 to 10 minutes. Transfer eggs to the bowl of ice water; let sit about 1 minute. Remove eggs from water; peel.

Place eggs in a container with 1 cup water, 1/2 cup soy sauce, and 2 tablespoons brown sugar. Dampen a paper towel in soy sauce mixture; cover container with dampened paper towel. Refrigerate 4 hours to overnight.
Drain black fungus; add to liquid in pork belly pot. Cover pot with a lid; refrigerate 4 hours to overnight.
Skim fungus from top of pork belly mixture; place in a pot with 8 cups water. Fungus should be covered in pork belly fat. Add remaining 1/4 cup soy sauce and miso paste; bring to a boil.
Remove and discard skin from pork belly using a knife. Chop meat into pieces of desired thickness. Cut eggs in half lengthwise.
Bring a separate pot of water to a boil. Add ramen and cook until noodles are tender yet firm to the bite, stirring occasionally, about 3 minutes. Drain.

Place 4 nori slices diagonally in corner of each bowl. Place noodles on top; arrange 2 egg halves and a few pork belly slices separately. Cover with black fungus, top with remaining 3 chopped green onion bulbs, and pour in broth. Top each bowl with a few slices of naruto. Let sit before serving, about 3 minutes.

rice-casserole-with-chicken-teleculinari.name: Rice Casserole With Chicken
instructions: Take to the fire a large pot with olive oil and let it warm. Add the chicken pieces and let it flush evenly.

Meanwhile, peel the carrot and cut it into pieces as well as the leek. Add to the chicken, wrap everything, cover with water and season with salt. Let it boil for 50 minutes. Then pour it, reserve the broth and let the chicken cool.
De seguida, desfie o frango, rejeite a pele e os ossos e reserve. Coza o arroz no caldo do frango (dobro do volume do arroz) e reserve.

Descasque e pique a cebola e os alhos e refogue-os numa frigideira com azeite e um pouco de tomilho. Junte o bacon, reservando alguns cubos para o final, e deixe caramelizar. Acrescente o frango desfiado, envolva e retifique os temperos de sal e pimenta.

On a tray, have half the rice, add the chicken preparation and cover with the remaining rice. Spread over the bacon you have reserved and bring to the oven, preheated to 180oC, for 15 minutes. Serve hot.

rich-chicken-bone-broth.name: Rich Chicken Bone Broth
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Place chicken bones, carrots, celery, onion, and garlic cloves on a baking sheet; drizzle with olive oil. Toss to coat.
Roast in the preheated oven for 30 minutes, stirring halfway through.
Transfer roasted bones and vegetables to a 6-quart slow cooker. Add vinegar, bay leaves, salt, and peppercorns; cover completely with water.

Cook on Low for 24 to 48 hours (but not any longer), adding 1 to 2 cups more water during the cooking process as needed to keep bones submerged. Strain broth using a fine-mesh strainer. Pour into jars and refrigerate until ready to use.

rigatoni-recipe-with-eggplant-and-ricott.name: Rigatoni Recipe With Eggplant And Ricotta Salata
rigatoni-recipe-with-eggplant-and-ricott.original_name: Receta rigatoni con berenjena y ricotta salata
instructions: Cut the eggplants into slices and sprinkle with salt and leave them to rest for about 20 minutes to let their bitterness go.
Meanwhile, pits onion and cuts into fine notebooks. He also cuts his garlic teeth.
Once after 20 minutes, rinse well the eggplants and seedlings.
Warm a frying pan with an olive oil and toss the eggplants from both sides till they have been golden.
When they're ready, put them back on paper.
Warm up a deep pan or pan with olive oil. Soak garlic and onion teeth for a few minutes or till they clear.
Fold the shredded tomatoes. Season with dry oregano, salt and pepper to taste. Mix and cook with low heat for about 15 minutes.
Incorporates roasted eggplants and carefully mixes. Finish cooking for another 5 minutes.
Apaga y reserva.
Take care of rigatoni with salt water till I get the dente. Drain and reserve a quarter cup of cooking water.
Incorpora el rigatoni a la salsa, las hojas de albahaca y la ricotta salata desmenuzada. Mezcla hasta que todo se integre perfectamente y apaga.
Sirve y disfruta.

roast-beef-argiro.name: Roast Beef

ingredients.item: 1 cucumber small cut into small frames
1 fresh onion finely chopped (with their leaves)
1 cucumber small cut into small frames
1 fresh onion finely chopped (with their leaves)

instructions: With a very sharp knife we slit the gabari in two by opening it in the shape of a butterfly, leaving the head to hold it.
We're heating a heavy pot of cologne or mandemi.
Brush with some olive oil and let it burn.
We're touching the shelled gabari in the mandemi.
Bake for 3-4′ until the transparent body turns white but the gaffari remains juicy.
Place them on a platter and serve with the sauce and couscous.

roasted-cabbage-dumplings-argiro.name: Roasted Cabbage Dumplings
instructions: Remove the cabbage stem first, after cutting it with a knife.
Then immerse it with the hole down in a boiling pot.
Boil for 10 minutes, until slightly softened.
In a bowl, add the minced meat, panseta, garlic, parsley, crumbs, parmesan, egg, salt and pepper and mix well.
The mixture will be as tight as the meatball mixture.
After the cabbage cools well, remove a leaf and fill with the minced meat mixture.
Roll as in the dolmades and add them to the pot.
Pour with the olive oil, let them fry and brown around, about 10 minutes, put half the wine out.
Allow the wine to evaporate completely and then add the remaining wine, tomatoes and bamboo.
Cover the pot and simmer for 20 minutes until the sauce thickens.
Finally, sprinkle with a little finely chopped parsley and check the salt and pepper in the sauce.

roasted-carrots-with-fennel-brown-butter.name: Roasted Carrots With Fennel-brown Butter
instructions: Preheat oven to 218°C. Trim carrot tops and coarsely chop. Measure out 2 Tbsp. carrot tops and set aside; reserve any remaining carrot tops for another use. Peel carrots, slice in half lengthwise, then cut into 2" pieces.
Toss carrots with oil, sugar, salt, and pepper on a rimmed baking sheet. Arrange in a single layer and roast carrots, stirring halfway through, until tender and lightly caramelized, 25–35 minutes.

Meanwhile, lightly crush fennel seeds using a mortar and pestle or the bottom of a heavy pan. Melt butter in a medium skillet over medium heat, then stir in crushed seeds. Cook, stirring occasionally, until foam subsides and butter becomes fragrant, nutty, and golden brown, 3–5 minutes. Transfer butter mixture to a medium bowl.
Once carrots are roasted, add them to butter mixture and toss to coat. Add lemon juice and toss to coat. Serve carrots topped with reserved carrot tops.

roasted-parsnips.name: Roasted Parsnips
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.

Cut larger ends of parsnips in half lengthwise. Slice parsnips on the diagonal into 1/4-inch-thick slices and place into a bowl. Try and keep pieces about the same size. Drizzle with 2 tablespoons olive oil and sprinkle with onion powder, garlic salt, and pepper. Spread onto the prepared baking sheet in a single layer.

Roast in the preheated oven until parsnips are lightly caramelized and soft, 25 to 28 minutes, turning over halfway through cooking. Remove to a serving dish, sprinkle with parsley and lightly drizzle with oil. Season with additional salt and pepper, if desired.

roasted-snapper-with-cream-sauce-telecul.name: Roasted Snapper With Cream Sauce
roasted-snapper-with-cream-sauce-telecul.original_name: Pargo assado com molho de natas
instructions: With a knife, make 3 blows on each side of the pargo and insert pieces of ham into them.

Peel and cut the onions and garlic into blades, spread on a tray, add the laurel leaf and place over the fish. Season with salt and pepper, water with white wine and water and bring it to the oven at 170oC for 25 minutes.
In the end, pour the liquid from the roast to a frying pan, take it to the fire and let it warm slightly. Add the creams and let reduce. Serve immediately, watering the fish with the sauce.
With a knife, make 3 blows on each side of the pargo and insert pieces of ham into them.

Peel and cut the onions and garlic into blades, spread on a tray, add the laurel leaf and place over the fish. Season with salt and pepper, water with white wine and water and bring it to the oven at 170oC for 25 minutes.
In the end, pour the liquid from the roast to a frying pan, take it to the fire and let it warm slightly. Add the creams and let reduce. Serve immediately, watering the fish with the sauce.

rogaliki-polish-jam-filled-crescents.name: Rogaliki (polish Jam-filled Crescents)
instructions: Stir milk and yeast together in a bowl until smooth. Set aside until foamy, about 10 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Combine flour, butter, sour cream, sugar, eggs, and egg yolks in a large bowl. Stir in yeast mixture. Mix well using an electric mixer at first, then using your hands.

Turn out dough onto a floured work surface and knead until smooth, adding more flour, 1 tablespoon at a time, if dough is sticking to your hands. Form dough into a long log and cut into 1 1/2-inch rounds. Cover rounds with a cloth.

Roll each round of dough into a thin circle. Cut the circle into six triangles, as you would a pizza. Place 1 teaspoon jam at the wider end of each triangle, then roll up like a croissant. Place on the prepared baking sheet. Repeat until all the dough is used up.
Bake in the preheated oven until rogaliki have risen and are golden brown, about 20 minutes. Remove from oven and cool completely, about 30 minutes.
Place confectioners' sugar in a bowl and stir in water, 1 tablespoon at a time, until a drizzling consistency is reached. Drizzle icing over cooled rogaliki.

rosemary-tomato-leek-soup.name: Rosemary Tomato Leek Soup

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Melt butter in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add leek, rosemary, and garlic; cook and stir until leek is tender and translucent, about 15 minutes.
Add tomatoes and cayenne pepper; bring to a simmer. Add basil; continue simmering until soup is reduced by half, about 1 hour.

Fill blender with half the soup. Cover and hold lid down with a potholder; pulse a few times before leaving on to blend until smooth. Return puréed soup to the saucepan. Stir in cream until soup reaches desired consistency; season with salt and black pepper.

rosemary-bacon-and-tomato-frittata.name: Rosemary, Bacon, And Tomato Frittata

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Place potatoes in a microwave-safe bowl; cook in the microwave, stirring occasionally, until tender but still hold shape, 2 to 3 minutes.
Whisk eggs, Parmesan cheese, milk, and half of the rosemary together in a bowl until smooth; season with salt and pepper.

Saute bacon in a large oven-proof skillet over medium-high heat until almost crisp, 4 to 5 minutes. Remove about 1/4 cup of the bacon and set aside; drain all but 2 tablespoons bacon drippings from the skillet.

Saute potatoes in the bacon drippings and remaining bacon until bacon is crisp, 1 to 2 minutes. Remove skillet from heat. Gently stir tomato and egg mixture into the potatoes. Sprinkle reserved bacon and remaining rosemary over egg mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven until eggs are set and frittata is browned, about 40 minutes. Cut frittata into wedges.

rusty-nail-cocktail.name: Rusty Nail Cocktail
instructions: Combine 1–1½ oz. Drambuie and 1–1½ oz. Scotch whisky in an old-fashioned glass filled with 2–3 large ice cubes; stir to chill, about 30 seconds.
Twist 1 wide strip lemon peel (if using) over glass to express the oils, and drop peel into glass.

rutabaga-noodles-with-sage-butter.name: Rutabaga Noodles With Sage Butter

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly cracked black pepper to taste

instructions: Cut rutabaga into thin noodles using a spiralizer.

Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Saute rutabaga noodles, stirring constantly, until the noodles start turning a bright yellow color, 4 to 5 minutes. Add water and cover with a lid. Lower heat to medium and steam noodles until they soften to an al dente texture, 7 to 8 minutes. Remove lid and toss noodles until water has evaporated. Transfer noodles to a bowl and keep warm.

Wipe out skillet and melt butter over medium heat. Swirl butter until brown specks begin to appear in the bottom of the skillet, 2 to 3 minutes. Add garlic to skillet and stir for 2 to 3 minutes, taking care not to burn. Add sage and stir to coat. Return rutabaga noodles to the pan and toss to combine. Season with salt and freshly cracked pepper. Garnish with crushed red pepper and serve immediately.
